title: Scape and Run Meshi Developer Art Pack
description: Brings back the old art in Scape & Run: Meshi
body:
Brings back the old art of the developer Modoromu to [Scape & Run: Meshi](https://modrinth.com/mod/scape-and-run-meshi)!

Disclaimer: Does not cover new items with sprites first created by Bilebirda. 

## From the developer:

_"I understand the new style may not match well with SRP's current public version, I will provide my old art as an optional resourcepack shortly." -Modoromu, 2025_
